bead.title: S15-7: Multi-node trust attestation forwarding (Story-14 coupling)
bead.description: BLOCKING for any non-localhost write enablement. In Story-14 coordinator topology, ensure originating peer identity attestation is forwarded unchanged from coordinator → client; client authorizes on both origin and coordinator identity. Add ADR-conformance lint that flags any new mutation resolver bypassing requireTrusted or omitting CSRF/Origin check on prompt-driven endpoints. Requires Story 14 to land. See /tmp/story-15-final.md §Risks 'Multi-node authorization gap' and §Tests Multi-node line.
bead.acceptance: Coordinator forwards origin identity unchanged in mutation envelope; client-side authorization checks both origin and coordinator identity; ADR-conformance lint added to CI and fails on any new mutation resolver missing requireTrusted or CSRF/Origin checks; integration test exercises coordinator→client operator-prompt path with identity attestation.
